proof_boundary: Structural proof-search matrix only; this is not a proof of Jensen-window PF-infinity, Jensen hyperbolicity, Laguerre-Polya membership, RH, or Lambda <= 0.

status_legend.live_structural_candidate: A possible route only if a uniform all-degree identity or theorem is proved.
status_legend.blocked_until_input_pf: Potentially useful only after an input PF or real-rootedness hypothesis is independently proved.
status_legend.rejected_by_countermodel: Blocked by exact low-degree algebra or finite-prefix/countermodel gates.

hard_low_degree_tests.implication: Any valid transfer theorem must specialize to the exact degree-2 signed-Hankel threshold.
A shifted-Hankel-only identity is too small; degree 3 already contains off-Hankel binomial-weighted Toeplitz products.
The proof mechanism must reproduce cubic contiguous Toeplitz minors, not only quadratic log-concavity.
Degree 4 tests the binomial-weighted coefficient arithmetic that a kernel, network, or determinant identity must explain uniformly.

required_countermodel_fields: blocked_promotion includes selected low-order Jensen-window Toeplitz minors
hard_low_degree_tests.implication: Any finite-prefix, selected-minor, or low-order-only proof step is rejected before it enters the manuscript route.

ansatz_rows.hoped_mechanism: Use signed shifted Hankel minors of A_k(0) directly as Jensen-window PF minors.
ansatz_rows.required_identity: Every binomially weighted Jensen-window Toeplitz minor would need to be a signed shifted-Hankel minor or a nonnegative combination of such minors.
ansatz_rows.low_degree_fit: Matches only the degree-2 contact test.
ansatz_rows.current_failure: Degree-3 and degree-4 selected Toeplitz minors contain binomially weighted off-Hankel products and cubic forms not supplied by the degree-2 signed-Hankel identity.
ansatz_rows.next_action: Do not use this as a proof route; retain it only as a rejection baseline for proposed bridge lemmas.
ansatz_rows.proof_boundary: Rejected ansatz only; not a bridge theorem.

ansatz_rows.hoped_mechanism: Represent every Jensen-window Toeplitz minor as a Cauchy-Binet or Andreief sum/integral of products of nonnegative determinants.
ansatz_rows.required_identity: For all d,n and every Toeplitz minor shape, det T_{d,n}[R,C] equals a finite sum or integral of manifestly nonnegative determinant products using only proved Xi/Phi data.
ansatz_rows.low_degree_fit: The Cauchy-Binet low-degree scout certifies the selected degree-2/3/4 hard formulas by adjacent log-concavity via nonnegative Bernstein coefficients, but finds no kernel identity.
ansatz_rows.current_failure: No uniform positive kernel identity is currently known; the selected low-degree formulas are too weak to identify one because a log-concave finite countermodel passes them while larger contiguous Jensen-window Toeplitz minors fail.
ansatz_rows.next_action: Move beyond the selected formulas: test larger contiguous minors and search for a uniform positive kernel pattern that covers every d,n and every Toeplitz minor shape.
ansatz_rows.proof_boundary: Live structural candidate only; the required positive identity is missing.

ansatz_rows.ansatz_family: planar network, production matrix, or LGV model
ansatz_rows.hoped_mechanism: Build a totally nonnegative matrix model whose path minors are exactly the Jensen-window Toeplitz minors.
ansatz_rows.required_identity: A Lindstrom-Gessel-Viennot, production-matrix, or equivalent network model must yield B^{d,n,0}_j=binom(d,j) A_{n+j}(0) and all of its Toeplitz minors.
ansatz_rows.low_degree_fit: Still open; the network has to produce the degree-3 cubic minors and the degree-4 binomial coefficients exactly, and cannot be the raw ordinary Motzkin/J-fraction production matrix, a global length-parity sign repair, or an absolute-value sign-state cover.
ansatz_rows.current_failure: No positive network or production matrix has been constructed for the zeta heat-flow Jensen windows. The reciprocal Motzkin obstruction scout rejects the raw ordinary J-fraction path model as manifest positivity because mu_2 already contains a negative lambda_1 path contribution and beta_1 is negative for d>=3; the parity-lift obstruction scout rejects global length-parity signs because same-length closed paths have both signs; and the state-space sign-lift obstruction scout rejects absolute-value sign-state covers because they overshoot mu_2 by 2*kappa_1.
ansatz_rows.next_action: Search for a genuinely modified binomial transform, parity-doubled state model, or Riordan/production-matrix representation whose minors survive the hard low-degree tests.
ansatz_rows.proof_boundary: Live structural candidate only; no positive network is currently proved.

ansatz_rows.hoped_mechanism: Use the binomial weights binom(d,j) as a multiplier/preserver acting on already real-rooted input windows.
ansatz_rows.required_identity: A preserver theorem must start from independently proved PF or real-rooted input windows and then preserve every shifted Jensen window.
ansatz_rows.low_degree_fit: Binomial weights are relevant, but they do not create the missing input real-rootedness.
ansatz_rows.current_failure: The needed input PF/real-rootedness of unweighted or shifted windows is itself an open theorem; using it would be circular.
ansatz_rows.next_action: Use preserver theory only as an auxiliary after a noncircular input PF theorem is available.
ansatz_rows.proof_boundary: Conditional auxiliary route only; it cannot close jwpf_06 without a separate input theorem.

ansatz_rows.hoped_mechanism: Derive a manifestly nonnegative integral formula for each Jensen-window Toeplitz minor.
ansatz_rows.required_identity: For all d,n,R,C, det T_{d,n}[R,C] = integral W_{d,n,R,C}(x) dx with W manifestly nonnegative under proved zeta heat-flow hypotheses.
ansatz_rows.low_degree_fit: Still open; the integral must specialize to the hard degree-3 and degree-4 determinant polynomials exactly.
ansatz_rows.current_failure: The corpus has positive determinant-integral language as an open target, but no formula for these Jensen-window minors.
ansatz_rows.next_action: Try Andreief, de Bruijn, or kernel-composition identities on the listed low-degree minors and reject any formula that only proves selected cases.
ansatz_rows.proof_boundary: Live structural candidate only; the determinant-integral formula is missing.

ansatz_rows.ansatz_family: finite grid interpolation or finite rectangle promotion
ansatz_rows.hoped_mechanism: Infer the all-degree/all-shift bridge from enough finite Arb/Sturm/PF rows or from interpolation over checked minors.
ansatz_rows.required_identity: A finite rectangle would need to determine every future shift, degree, and Toeplitz minor for the actual A_k(0).
ansatz_rows.low_degree_fit: Finite checked rows can pass and still fail at the next untested coefficient or larger contiguous minor.
ansatz_rows.current_failure: The finite Jensen-window rectangle trap preserves current coefficient inputs and breaks the next degree-2 Jensen discriminant; the low-degree algebra countermodel also passes selected minors while larger contiguous minors fail.
ansatz_rows.next_action: Use finite grids only for falsification pressure and normalization checks; never as a target-closing proof step.
ansatz_rows.proof_boundary: Rejected proof move; finite evidence is not an all-order bridge theorem.

invariants: No ansatz row has readiness ready_to_apply.
Every live structural candidate must require all hard low-degree tests.
Every live structural candidate must still name a missing uniform identity or theorem.
The finite countermodel kill gate remains part of every ansatz row.
